messages.content: Architect skill invoked. Read AGENTS.md to understand scope and responsibilities. User selected Full Gated Workflow mode.
Step 1 Understand - Read Architect Rules.md (constitutional, architectural, IDE, process constraints). Ready for architectural task.
Step 1 Understand - Read Architect Rules.md (constitutional, architectural, IDE, process constraints). Ready for architectural task.

Step 2 Architect Interaction - User requested: Change current workflow name to better represent what it does. User suggestion: 'Architect Implement'. Research online for workflow naming best practices.

Step 3 Research - Web search on workflow naming best practices found: 1) Avoid generic names (Manager, Handler, Processor), use specific action-oriented names, 2) Use consistent structure: Domain-Entity-Action-Trigger pattern, 3) Include metadata (action intent, scope, version), 4) Domain-driven naming aligns with business capabilities. Current 'Architect Workflow' is generic; workflow actually performs implementation (understand→research→options→decide→specify→implement→test→verify→document). Research sources: Socratopia, Fredrik Engseth, SFDC Developers, Rutvik Bhatt, AZ365.ai.

best_practices_found: Include action intent and scope metadata

messages.content: Step 4 Options - Generated 3 workflow naming options with full metrics and research-based rubric: 1) Architect Implementation Cycle (Quality 9/10, Token Cost 8/10, Efficiency 9/10) - Architect recommendation, 2) Architect Implementation Workflow (Quality 8/10, Token Cost 7/10, Efficiency 8/10), 3) Architect Implement (Quality 7/10, Token Cost 9/10, Efficiency 7/10). Research sources: workflow naming best practices.

Step 5 Decide - User selected 'Architect Implementation Cycle'. Architect validates constitutional compliance: name change is infrastructure documentation only, no application code involved, within Architect scope. Decision aligns with research best practices.

Step 6 Specify - Specification for workflow name change to 'Architect Implementation Cycle': Files to modify: Workflow/Architect/Architect Workflow.md, .devin/skills/architect/SKILL.md, Agents/Architect/AGENTS.md. Replace 'Architect Workflow' with 'Architect Implementation Cycle' consistently. User selected Manual implementation mode.
